patch.value: Read-only docs + CI/CD + secret-scan audit session. Scope: README.md, AGENTS.md, all docs/*.md, plugins/* READMEs, packages/* READMEs, .github/workflows/*, repo-wide secret scan. Findings filed as child items tagged audit-2026-06-12.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: pm search 'docs CI audit 2026-06-12' + 'documentation drift audit' found prior audits (pm-5dbn 2026-06-07 story,pm-obxz closed) but no 2026-06-12 audit task. This is the session tracker.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text:
Audit complete (read-only; findings filed as children pm-m4bx, pm-xvzm, pm-7u4z, pm-u8y9, pm-cxi9, pm-c97q, pm-5909).

SECRET SCAN: CLEAN. git-tracked files only: no private IPv4 (192.168/10.x/172.16-31), no telemetry host IP, no ssh user@host strings, no personal emails, no sk-/ghp_/github_pat_/npm_/sntrys_/sntryu_ token literals (only the detector rules in scripts/check-secrets-lib.mjs, test fixtures under tests/, and prior-audit evidence text naming pattern families). node scripts/check-secrets.mjs exits 0. scripts/prod and .env confirmed untracked.

CI/CD: healthy. gh run list (15): all green except one PR-branch CI failure immediately fixed in the next push; today's scheduled Auto Release (27400423759) -> dispatched Release (27400708149) chain succeeded, so the daily release path incl Sentry gate is verified live. All 6 workflows: SHA-pinned actions, least-privilege permissions, concurrency groups, caches. Only structural finding: pm-5909 (md-only push gap for plugins/packages markdown).

TOOL/COUNT COHERENCE: 25 MCP tools consistent across README.md:54, docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:68+126, plugins/pm-claude/README.md, plugin.json, marketplace.json; 5 skills/14 commands/4 subagents claims match actual plugin file counts.

DUPLICATION CHECK (.claude/.agents/assets/plugins): no contradictory instructions. pm-developer and pm-release skills exist in 3 flavors (.agents/skills CLI-flavored, plugins/pm-claude MCP-flavored, plugins/pm-codex) — intentional per-harness variants with consistent workflow semantics; maintenance cost acknowledged, no action filed. Guide-shell snippet duplication was already addressed by closed pm-48vd. AGENTS.md/README/docs progressive-disclosure structure is in good shape; README remains minimal and link-first.

Top quick-wins for this session PR: (1) pm-m4bx install-spec fix (3 one-line edits, user-facing P2), (2) pm-u8y9 SDK.md resource kinds (2 lines), (3) pm-cxi9 plugin doc tree/version (drift-proof by pointing at canonical README), (4) pm-7u4z Plan/type-list + ARCHITECTURE layout refresh.

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-agent
value.text: GitHub/release health evidence: no open PRs; latest main CI/Docs/CodeQL were green in gh run list; Dependabot and CodeQL alerts are fixed; pnpm audit --audit-level moderate passed on retry. Outdated packages are @types/node patch, esbuild patch, and commander 15 major; commander major remains backlog pending Node support review.

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-agent
value.text: Release gate evidence: pm-changelog latest/project version is 2026.6.10 and pnpm changelog:pm:check passed with CHANGELOG.md unchanged (item_count 1098). Sentry gate passed in release parity mode with telemetry off: critical=0 high=0, 19 expected handled CLI issues ignored. Compatibility check against npm @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.6.12 failed because that exact version is not published yet, so local pack/npx/plugin/package smoke gates were used for this branch.

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-agent
value.text: Telemetry evidence: node dist/cli.js telemetry flush --json drained queued events, left queue_invalid_rows=0, and updated last_successful_flush_at=2026-06-12T16:53:51.247Z; telemetry stats showed command_start/command_finish rows for active pm commands.

value.author: codex-sdk-cli-agent
value.text: Package smoke evidence: npm pack --dry-run passed, pnpm smoke:npx passed (packed package 2026.6.12, 10 packages), node scripts/smoke-claude-plugin.mjs passed (25 MCP tools), and pnpm dogfood:package-first passed (87 commands).

author: codex-sdk-cli-agent
message: Remediation bundle completed selected children; remaining audit children stay open for future PRs.
